description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and in-seam, half sleeves with brand embroidery on left sleeve, and mildly distressed graphic print with inward print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Stylish to the T and perfectly protraying the essence of lee's origin in Kansas, this white t-shirt is a great way to acknowledge the brand's dedication in creating the best jean and casual wear for millions across the world. Team this T-shirt with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
